source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements and DPE/CAG-cited improvement programmes. industry_sources cite real published works.

levers.description: Implement Voluntary Retirement Scheme (VRS) to reduce headcount in overstaffed functions; redeploy staff to growth areas; contract-out non-core services.
industry_sources: DPE Annual Survey 2022-23 (dpe.gov.in) — VRS cited as key manpower cost reduction tool for loss-making CPSEs; BHEL VRS 2019-20 reduced headcount 10,000
Ministry of Heavy Industries — BHEL revival plan 2022: workforce rationalisation as strategic pillar
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — manpower rationalisation savings from 2 India PSU turnaround mandates

levers.description: Mandate Government e-Marketplace (GeM) for all eligible purchases; implement centralised procurement for common items across CPSE group; standardise technical specifications.
industry_sources: GeM Annual Report 2023-24 (gem.gov.in) — ₹2.5 Lakh Cr in transactions; CPSEs mandated to procure via GeM; competitive pricing 8-15% below traditional procurement
CVC (Central Vigilance Commission) Procurement Guidelines — GeM adoption saves procurement time and reduces corruption risk
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — GeM-based procurement savings from 3 India CPSE procurement transformation mandates

levers.description: Implement inventory analytics to identify slow-moving stores & spares; reduce dead stock; implement VMI with key suppliers; standardise spare parts catalogue.
industry_sources: CAG Reports on CPSEs 2023-24 (cag.gov.in) — excess inventory is recurring finding; BHEL stores blocking ₹3,000+ Cr in excess inventory cited
DPE Survey 2022-23 — inventory days 90-180 for manufacturing CPSEs vs. private sector median 45-60 days
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — inventory rationalisation savings from 3 India PSU supply chain mandates

levers.description: Migrate from legacy systems to modern ERP (SAP S/4HANA); implement e-tendering and digital payments; deploy analytics for production planning and cost monitoring.
industry_sources: MeitY Digital India programme — ERP adoption in CPSEs mandated for transparency; CIL SAP implementation cited as modernisation benchmark
Gartner ERP 2024 — S/4HANA migration reduces IT maintenance 20-30% vs. legacy ERP + process efficiency gains 10-15%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — ERP modernisation savings from 2 India PSU digital transformation mandates

levers.description: PAT (Perform Achieve and Trade) scheme compliance; implement waste heat recovery, motor efficiency upgrades, compressed air leak reduction, lighting LED retrofit.
industry_sources: BEE (Bureau of Energy Efficiency) PAT Scheme Cycle VI 2023-24 (beeindia.gov.in) — designated consumers (DCs) including CPSEs must achieve specific energy reduction targets
BHEL FY25 Annual Report — energy efficiency investments under PAT scheme at manufacturing plants
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — energy efficiency savings from 3 India manufacturing PSU energy mandates

levers.description: Improve debtor days through active collection of government dues, advance payment clauses in new contracts, and legal proceedings for aged receivables.
industry_sources: CAG Reports on CPSEs 2023-24 — excess receivables: BHEL outstanding dues from government utilities cited; debtors >180 days flagged
DPE CPSE Survey 2022-23 — working capital management improvement as key recommendation for Miniratna CPSEs
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — receivables recovery savings from 2 India PSU commercial excellence mandates
